zh.lifeSummary: Henry Spencer是Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford和Dorothy的兒子，於大約1408年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴德比。他於大約1438年與Isabelle Lincoln在英國瓦維其可爾霍德爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1477年8月在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴德比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry Spencer是Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford和Dorothy的儿子，于大约1408年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾巴德比。他于大约1438年与Isabelle Lincoln在英国瓦維其可爾霍德爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1477年8月在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾巴德比。

nameMeanings.name: Spencer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): occupational name for someone who dispensed provisions or money, from Middle English spenser(e), spencer(e) ‘household steward, butler, almoner’ (Anglo-Norman French espenser, Old French despensier). Compare Spence and Spender . There is some dispute about the origins of the Spencer family, whose most famous member in recent times was the late Princess of Wales, born Lady Diana Spencer (1961–97). Some sources say that they are descended from William the Conqueror's steward, Robert Despencer. What is clear is that by the 15th century they had become prosperous from sheep farming in Northamptonshire. Robert Spencer (died 1627) was said to be the wealthiest man in England. Their titles have included Earls of Sunderland and Earls Spencer; and through the female line the 5th Earl of Sunderland also became Duke of Marlborough in 1733. This connection was the result of the marriage, in 1700, of the 3rd Duke of Sunderland to the daughter of John Churchill, 1st Duke of Marlborough. The youngest son of this union, John Spencer (1708–46), was the father of the 1st Earl Spencer (1734–83).

variants.name: Spence
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a servant employed in the pantry of a great house or monastery, from Middle English spense, spence ‘pantry, larder, storeroom’ (Old French despense, from a Late Latin derivative of dispendere, past participle dispensus ‘to weigh out or dispense’). Compare Spencer .

variants.name: Spender
meanings: occupational name or status name from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘steward, treasurer’, a shortened form of Middle English, Old French despendour, denoting someone who managed money or supplies. Compare Spencer .
alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘spender (of money), spendthrift’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Henry Spencer was born about 1408, in Badby, Northamptonshire, England as the son of Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford and Dorothy. He married Isabelle Lincoln about 1438, in Hodnell, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in August 1477, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Badby, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry Spencer est né environ 1408, à Badby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, fils de Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford et Dorothy. Il a épousé Isabelle Lincoln environ 1438, à Hodnell, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en août 1477, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Badby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Henry Spencer wurde um 1408 in Badby, Northamptonshire, England, als Sohn von Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford und Dorothy geboren. Er hat um 1438 in Hodnell, Warwickshire, England Isabelle Lincoln geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im August 1477 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Badby, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Henry Spencer è nato il circa 1408 nel Badby, Northamptonshire, England come figlio di Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford e Dorothy. Lui sposato Isabelle Lincoln circa 1438, nel Hodnell, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel agosto 1477, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Badby, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Spencerは約1408年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーでSir Thomas Spencer of DeffordとDorothyの息子として生まれた。約1438年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアホードネルでIsabelle Lincolnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1477年8月に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Spencer(은)는 대략 1408년 영국 노르섬프토실르 바드비에서 Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford(와)과 Dorothy의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1438년 영국 워윅실르 호드넬에서 Isabelle Lincoln(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1477년 8월 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 바드비에 묻혔다.

mn.Upper Radbourn, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: Warwick, Wæringscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Henry Spencer nasceu aproximadamente 1408, em Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filho de Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford e Dorothy. Ele casou-se com Isabelle Lincoln aproximadamente 1438, em Hodnell, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1477, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry Spencer родился около 1408 г. в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford и Dorothy. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle Lincoln около 1438 г. в местности ходнелл, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер август 1477 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Henry Spencer nació aproximadamente 1408, en Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford y Dorothy. Se casó con Isabelle Lincoln aproximadamente 1438, en Hodnell, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en agosto de 1477, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
